zh.title: Run安装器
zh.desc: 在路由器上上传并执行脚本或安装包，注意架构务必匹配。
zh.drop_tip: 拖入文件，或从电脑选择。
zh.clean_done: 临时文件与日志已清理。
zh.only_supported: 仅支持 .run、.sh、.ipk 和 .apk 文件。
zh.err_no_opkg: 您的系统不支持 ipk 包安装，请选择 apk 包。
zh.err_no_apk: 您的系统不支持 apk 包安装，请选择 ipk 包。
zh.args_hint: 您可以输入脚本参数或留空
zh.auto_cleaned: 执行完毕，已自动清理临时文件。

en.title: Run Installer
en.desc: Upload and execute scripts or packages on this router, ensuring architecture compatibility.
en.drop_tip: Drop a file here, or choose one from your computer.
en.clean_done: Temporary files and logs were removed.
en.err_no_opkg: Your system does not support ipk package installation. Please use .apk packages instead.
en.err_no_apk: Your system does not support apk package installation. Please use .ipk packages instead.
en.args_hint: You can enter script arguments or leave it blank
en.auto_cleaned: Execution complete, temporary files cleaned automatically.
